subject: Helga Sinclair — a figure in a white sleeveless top and dark pants leaping through the air in a dynamic combative pose, hair pulled back with a long tail, expression fierce
description: A figure in a white sleeveless top and dark pants launches through the air in a wide-legged leap, arms extended, with a long hair tail trailing behind. The expression is fierce and focused — mouth open, eyes sharp. Dark gloves cover the hands. The pose is entirely airborne with no ground contact visible, conveying athletic speed and aggression. The background is a pale blue-teal wash suggesting an open outdoor or elevated setting with what may be architectural stone elements partially visible. The art style is clean animated Disney with bold, confident linework.
foreground: figure in white top and dark pants leaping through air, arms extended
background: pale blue-teal wash with partial stone architectural elements
emotion: fierce aggression; athletic intensity; open-mouthed battle focus
